plan.description: Explore the project structure: find all .ts files, read index.ts to understand the module layout. Map out models/, services/, utils/ directories.
Read all model files (user.ts, product.ts, order.ts) and identify the SQL injection vulnerability — all queries use string interpolation with template literals instead of parameterized queries.
Fix all three model files to stop using string interpolation in SQL. Use parameterized queries with placeholders ($1, ?, :name, etc.) instead of embedding values in the SQL string.

initialState.task: Find and fix the SQL injection vulnerabilities in the model layer. All model files use template literal string interpolation in SQL queries — e.g. `SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '${id}'` instead of parameterized queries.

assertions.description: user.ts should not use string interpolation for id
product.ts should not use string interpolation for name
order.ts should not use string interpolation for userId
